SYNTHETIC FIXTURE - NOT A RECORDED DEED. For parser testing only.

A part of the Southeast Quarter of Section 9, Township 15 North, Range 1 East,
Hendricks County, Indiana, described as follows:

Beginning at a point on the South line of said Quarter Section, said point
being North 89 degrees 45 minutes 00 seconds East, 200.00 feet from the
Southwest corner thereof;

thence North 30 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 400.00 feet;
thence South 60 degrees 00 minutes 00 seconds East, 346.41 feet;
thence South 89 degrees 45 minutes 00 seconds West, 545.21 feet to the Point
of Beginning.
